info.title: Stripe Service API
info.description: Payment processing service built on Stripe. Handles checkout sessions, payment intents, webhook processing for payment events, and integrates with runs-service for cost tracking.

tags.name: Products
tags.description: Create and manage Stripe products and prices

discounts.description: Discounts to apply to the checkout session

id.description: Custom Stripe Product ID for idempotent creates

productId.description: Stripe Product ID to attach the price to

recurring.description: Recurring pricing configuration. Omit for one-time prices.

id.description: Custom Stripe Coupon ID for idempotent creates

percentOff.description: Percentage discount (1-100). Provide this OR amountOffInCents.

amountOffInCents.description: Fixed amount discount in cents. Provide this OR percentOff.

currency.description: Currency code. Required if amountOffInCents is provided.

duration.description: How long the coupon applies (default: once)

durationInMonths.description: Number of months (required if duration is repeating)

maxRedemptions.description: Maximum number of times the coupon can be redeemed

redeemBy.description: ISO 8601 date after which the coupon can no longer be redeemed

valid.description: Whether the coupon is still valid

post.description: Creates a Stripe Checkout Session and records the payment in the database. Runs-service integration is BLOCKING.
Creates a Stripe Payment Intent and records the payment in the database. Runs-service integration is BLOCKING.
Creates a product in Stripe. Pass an optional id for idempotent creates — if the product already exists, it will be returned.

post.summary: Create a Stripe price for a product
post.description: Creates a price attached to a Stripe product. Use the returned priceId in checkout sessions.
Creates a coupon in Stripe. Pass an optional id for idempotent creates — if the coupon already exists, it will be returned.

get.summary: Get a Stripe product by ID
Get a Stripe price by ID
List active prices for a product
Get a Stripe coupon by ID

post.description: Receives and processes Stripe webhook events. Uses Stripe signature verification.
